description: A new customer has purchased professional services. An Implementation Consultant needs to conduct a discovery call to understand their goals and technical environment.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a discovery call with the customer's project stakeholders.
During the call, ask structured questions about the customer's goals, existing systems, and technical requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all necessary information to begin planning the project.

nodes.task_description: Document the discovery findings and share them with the customer for validation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed discovery document that will form the basis of the project plan.
